description: Fast PR pipeline for OBJECTIVELY TRIVIAL changes only (docs/comments/config-value/string-copy, or a very small diff with no logic, control-flow, dependency, schema, auth, security, or externally-visible-contract change). One review pass instead of two, and the lavish approval gate may be skipped — see the active runtime's change-review skill for the trivial criteria. Tests still run and merge authority is unchanged (never merge red). Select per task, not per repo; when in doubt use pr-pipeline.default.json.

gates.note: the single independent read of the diff against base
apply coldstart findings on the same branch
must pass; the fast path never skips this
open the PR with the branch convention and a short human description
